caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on a breaking news story related to political developments in Bihar. The headline at the top of the screen reads "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" which translates to "Will there be a game with JDU in 2024?" The main speaker is Tejashwi Yadav, the former Deputy Chief Minister of Bihar, who is being interviewed outdoors, possibly in a park or garden setting. He is holding a microphone with the ANI (Asian News International) logo, indicating that this is an on-the-ground report. The screen also features images and names of other political figures, including Nitish Kumar, Santosh Suman, and Sumit Kumar, suggesting that the discussion involves their roles and potential alliances in the upcoming political scenario. The timestamp at the bottom right corner shows that the segment was broadcast at 10:02 PM.
